records.question: Which height_info entries have a height of exactly 6'5" and are at least 195 cm tall?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT height_info.height_id FROM height_info
WHERE height_info.height_in_cm >= 195 AND height_info.height_in_inch = '6''5"'
records.pred_sql: SELECT height_id FROM height_info WHERE height_in_cm >= 195 AND height_in_inch = '6'

records.question: What height entries are at most 193 cm tall?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT height_info.height_id FROM height_info
WHERE height_info.height_in_cm <= 193
records.pred_sql: SELECT height_id FROM height_info WHERE height_in_cm <= 193

records.question: Which heights correspond to players that have played at least one game, were born on or before 1982-12-09, have a CSS rank of at least 11, accumulated 2862 or more total 7-year ice time, and where shoots is exactly L?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT height_info.height_id FROM height_info
JOIN playerinfo ON height_info.height_id = playerinfo.height
JOIN weight_info ON playerinfo.weight = weight_info.weight_id
WHERE playerinfo.gp_greater_than_0 = 'yes' AND playerinfo.birthdate <= '1982-12-09' AND playerinfo.css_rank >= 11 AND playerinfo.sum_7yr_toi >= 2862 AND playerinfo.shoots = 'L'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  T1.height_id
FROM height_info AS T1
INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2
  ON T1.height_id = T2.height
INNER JOIN weight_info AS T3
  ON T2.weight = T3.weight_id
WHERE
  T2.GP_greater_than_0 = 'yes' AND T2.birthdate <= '1982-12-09' AND T2.CSS_rank >= 11 AND T2.sum_7yr_TOI >= 2862 AND T2.shoots = 'L'

records.question: Which height entries correspond to players drafted in 1998 or earlier who are at most 190 cm tall?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT height_info.height_id FROM height_info
JOIN playerinfo ON height_info.height_id = playerinfo.height
WHERE playerinfo.draftyear <= 1998 AND height_info.height_in_cm <= 190
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.height_id FROM height_info AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.height_id = T2.height WHERE T1.height_in_cm <= 190 AND T2.draftyear <= 1998

records.question: Which height records are associated with the player Jarkko Immonen from Finland who has exactly 207 sum_7yr_toi and at most 20 sum_7yr_gp?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT height_info.height_id FROM height_info
JOIN playerinfo ON height_info.height_id = playerinfo.height
WHERE playerinfo.nation = 'Finland' AND playerinfo.sum_7yr_toi = 207 AND playerinfo.sum_7yr_gp <= 20 AND playerinfo.playername = 'Jarkko Immonen'

SELECT
  T1.height_id
FROM height_info AS T1
INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2
  ON T1.height_id = T2.height
WHERE
  T2.nation = 'Finland' AND T2.sum_7yr_TOI = 207 AND T2.sum_7yr_GP <= 20 AND T2.PlayerName = 'Jarkko Immonen'

records.question: Which height information corresponds to players whose position is exactly C/RW?

records.question: Which height records correspond to players exactly 5'10" tall who are right wings from Italy, named Anthony Aquino, drafted in round 3, with at least 0 sum_7yr_toi?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT height_info.height_id FROM height_info
JOIN playerinfo ON height_info.height_id = playerinfo.height
WHERE height_info.height_in_inch = '5''10"' AND playerinfo.sum_7yr_toi >= 0 AND playerinfo.position_info = 'RW' AND playerinfo.nation = 'Italy' AND playerinfo.playername = 'Anthony Aquino' AND playerinfo.draftround = 3
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.height_id FROM height_info AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.height_id = T2.height WHERE T1.height_in_inch = '5' AND T2.sum_7yr_TOI >= 0 AND T2.position_info = 'RW' AND T2.nation = 'Italy' AND T2.PlayerName = 'Anthony Aquino' AND T2.draftround = 3

records.question: What height information is associated with Rene Vydareny, a Slovakian defenseman who shoots left, was born in 1981, drafted in 1999 or earlier, and is at least 185 cm tall?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT height_info.height_id FROM height_info
JOIN playerinfo ON height_info.height_id = playerinfo.height
JOIN weight_info ON playerinfo.weight = weight_info.weight_id
WHERE playerinfo.position_info = 'D' AND playerinfo.playername = 'Rene Vydareny' AND playerinfo.shoots = 'L' AND playerinfo.birthyear = 1981 AND playerinfo.draftyear <= 1999 AND playerinfo.nation = 'Slovakia' AND height_info.height_in_cm >= 185
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.height_id FROM height_info AS T1 JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.height_id = T2.height JOIN weight_info AS T3 ON T2.weight = T3.weight_id WHERE T1.height_in_cm >= 185 AND T2.position_info = 'D' AND T2.PlayerName = 'Rene Vydareny' AND T2.shoots = 'L' AND T2.birthyear = 1981 AND T2.draftyear <= 1999 AND T2.nation = 'Slovakia'

records.question: Which height entries correspond to players from the USA who are exactly 190 cm tall?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT height_info.height_id FROM height_info
JOIN playerinfo ON height_info.height_id = playerinfo.height
JOIN weight_info ON playerinfo.weight = weight_info.weight_id
WHERE playerinfo.nation = 'USA' AND height_info.height_in_cm = 190
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.height_id FROM height_info AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.height_id = T2.height INNER JOIN weight_info AS T3 ON T2.weight = T3.weight_id WHERE T1.height_in_cm = 190 AND T2.nation = 'USA'

records.question: Which height_info entries represent players exactly 6'2" tall who are RW/C born in 1986 in the USA, drafted in round 5 or later, with a CSS rank of at most 208, birthmonth no more than 3, and have not played any games?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT height_info.height_id FROM height_info
JOIN playerinfo ON height_info.height_id = playerinfo.height
WHERE playerinfo.birthyear = 1986 AND playerinfo.draftround >= 5 AND height_info.height_in_inch = '6''2"' AND playerinfo.position_info = 'RW/C' AND playerinfo.css_rank <= 208 AND playerinfo.gp_greater_than_0 = 'no' AND playerinfo.nation = 'USA' AND playerinfo.birthmonth <= 3
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.height_id FROM height_info AS T1 INNER JOIN PlayerInfo AS T2 ON T1.height_id = T2.height WHERE T1.height_in_inch = '6' AND T2.birthyear = '1986' AND T2.draftround >= 5 AND T2.position_info = 'RW/C' AND T2.CSS_rank <= 208 AND T2.GP_greater_than_0 = 'no' AND T2.nation = 'USA' AND T2.birthmonth <= 3
